source_items.title: I'm gonna be running a deep dive session on how Yoshi and I built our prediction model next week I'll be sharing: - How to build a model - Mistakes I made (that you can avoid) - Lessons learned - What
Last week, Penguins huddled in Bangkok, the heart of Thailand. A big thank you to for supporting this event. Here's a recap of SEABW Padel Night
